mapper.select:
select board_no, board_category, board_title, board_thumb, board_writer, board_status, to_char(board_date,'yyyy-mm-dd') as board_date, member_thumb from board_tbl join member_tbl on (board_writer = member_id)
board_status = #{status}
board_status = 1
and board_category = 1
and board_category = 2
and board_title like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
and board_writer = #{searchKeyword}
order by board_no asc
order by board_no desc
offset #{page} * #{size} rows fetch next #{size} rows only
mapper.insert: insert into board_tbl ( board_no, board_category, board_title, board_content, board_thumb, board_writer, board_date, board_status, attraction_no, location_no, place_name, address_name ) values ( #{boardNo}, #{boardCategory}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{boardThumb, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{boardWriter}, sysdate, 1, #{attractionNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{locationNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{placeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addressName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT b.board_no AS boardNo, b.board_category AS boardCategory, b.board_title AS boardTitle, b.board_content AS boardContent, b.board_writer AS boardWriter, b.board_status AS boardStatus, TO_CHAR(b.board_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS boardDate, b.address_name AS addressName, m.member_thumb AS memberThumb, CASE WHEN b.board_category = 1 THEN a.attraction_title ELSE b.place_name END AS placeName FROM board_tbl b JOIN member_tbl m ON (b.board_writer = m.member_id) LEFT JOIN attraction_tbl a ON (b.attraction_no = a.attraction_no) WHERE b.board_no = #{boardNo}
mapper.update: update board_tbl set board_title = #{boardTitle}, board_content = #{boardContent, jdbcType=CLOB}, board_thumb = #{boardThumb, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, board_category = #{boardCategory}, attraction_no = #{attractionNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, location_no = #{locationNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, place_name = #{placeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address_name = #{addressName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where board_no = #{boardNo}
mapper.select: select count(*) from board_like_tbl where board_no = #{boardNo}
select count(*) from board_like_tbl where board_no = #{boardNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.delete: delete from board_like_tbl where board_no = #{boardNo} and member_Id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: insert into board_comment_tbl ( board_comment_no, board_comment_content, board_comment_writer, board_no, board_comment_date, comment_status ) values ( #{boardCommentNo}, #{boardCommentContent}, #{boardCommentWriter}, #{boardNo}, sysdate, 1 )
mapper.select: select board_comment_no, board_comment_content, board_comment_writer, board_no, board_comment_date, comment_status, member_thumb from board_comment_tbl join member_tbl on(board_comment_writer = member_id) where board_no = #{boardNo} order by board_comment_no

select board_comment_no, board_comment_content, board_comment_writer, board_no, board_comment_date, comment_status, member_thumb from board_comment_tbl join member_tbl on (board_comment_writer = member_id) where board_comment_no = #{boardCommentNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE board_tbl SET board_status = #{boardStatus} WHERE board_no = #{boardNo}
